title: FaeriesGUI-java
description: GUI Pack for Java users for FaeriesSMP
body:
### Java GUI resourcepack for FaeriesSMP
This resource pack adds custom gui's that fit the vibe and theme of FaeriesSMP.
This does not overhaul anything else, keeping a vanilla feeling to the resource pack, adding pink GUI's.
**This pack is intended to be used on the FaeriesSMP server.** Report issues on our discord server.
